creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
See also https://reviews.freebsd.org/D30490 depending on dependent port breakage we may be able to move directly to 1.12.0.

Feel free to reply/comment on the freebsd-erlang@freebsd.org mailing list, see https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-erlang/2021-May/001563.html
